title: HeadyFinance — CSL-Gated AI Trading Signals & φ-Scaled Risk Models
description: HeadyFinance delivers institutional-grade AI trading signals through a 7-gate CSL validation pipeline, φ-scaled risk models, Monte Carlo backtesting, and a full Quant API — for systematic traders and quantitative developers.
ogTitle: HeadyFinance — Geometric Intelligence for Financial Markets
ogDescription: CSL-gated signals. φ-scaled risk models. 10K+ Monte Carlo paths. Institutional-grade quantitative AI for systematic traders — available via REST and WebSocket API.
twitterDescription: Markets run on math. CSL-gated signals + φ-scaled risk models + Monte Carlo backtesting = your quantitative edge. Not financial advice.
